source_metadata.title: 2026/06/17 - SSC (Part 3)
source_metadata.description:
Wednesday, 17 June 2026 | Social Services and Community Committee

2026/27 Estimates for Vote Disabled People; 2026/27 Estimates for Vote Disability Support Services 

Hearing of Evidence:

Minister for Disability Issues 

 Hon Louise Upston 


Ministry of Disabled People 

Paula Tesoriero, Secretary for Disabled People and Chief Executive 
Ben O'Meara, Deputy Chief Executive Policy and Insights 
Rebecca Elvy, Deputy Chief Executive Outreach and Innovation

Anne Shaw, Deputy Chief Executive, DSS 
Justine Cornwall, General Manager DSS Policy 
Alastair Hill, General Manager DSS Transformation
